data_avail: daily-only (no 5m tape for 2023-08; yahoo 5m since 2026-05-25, long5m since 2026-04-27) — daily context checkable, exact 5m box not
box_tol: n/a — no code path in bundle emits a box, a bars-width, or a %-height
entry_match: n/a — maturity annotation, mark has no entry
numeric_gap: user box = 89 5m-bars wide (~1.19 NSE sessions) x 6.46 pt (-0.48% of ~1330; 0.48%*1330=6.38pt, matches tooltip). volume.py computes VSA class of ONE candle (climax/stopping/no_demand/absorption); timestats.py computes intraday danger bucket. Neither measures bars-width, %-height, or zone age -> zero overlap with the annotation.
root_cause: structural gap: the volume_time bundle has no maturity/box-geometry detector. volume=single-candle VSA booster (needs colocated evidence, strength 0.3), timestats=time-of-DAY danger table — the user's 'time' here is zone MATURITY (bars-span) + compression (%-height), an orthogonal object neither codes.

box_tol: n/a — no code path in bundle emits a box, a bars-width, or a %-height
entry_match: n/a — maturity annotation, mark has no entry
numeric_gap: same outer-OB tooltip as t9b (6.46 / -0.48% / 89 Bars), re-drawn one screenshot later. Detector still emits nothing dimensioned in bars or percent-height; VSA thresholds (2*atr range, 2*sma/1.5*sma vol, z_hi=1.5) and NSE danger buckets never produce a maturity number.
root_cause: structural gap (duplicate of t9b): no maturity/compression detector in the bundle; volume+timestats are orthogonal to an OB bars-x-percent measurement.

numeric_gap: TIME = green vertical dashed killzone/time-of-delivery line gating the setup. timestats.py is the NEAREST concept but emits a per-bucket NEUTRAL danger (strength=1-danger, ttl 1) only for NSE 375-min sessions — a soft danger score, not a hard delivery/killzone GATE, and it never draws a vertical time marker. No tape/axis to numerically test.
root_cause: reference graphic (no NSE tape) + concept mismatch: timestats scores intraday sweep-danger; it does not gate 'time of price delivery' (a killzone). Unverifiable and not the same object.
